cmd='/usr/bin/cmake;-DCMAKE_C_FLAGS=;-DCMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE= -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -s -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt -ldl -lm -DENV_HCCS;-DCMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG= -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -s -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt -ldl -lm -DDEBUG -DENV_HCCS;-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=;-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE= -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -s -O2 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -g -DNDEBUG=1 -lrt -ldl;-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG= -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -fPIE -fPIC -s -O0 -ggdb3 -g -lrt -ldl;-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release;-DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR=<INSTALL_DIR>/lib;-DCMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR=<INSTALL_DIR>/bin;-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=<INSTALL_DIR>/;-DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF;-GUnix Makefiles;-S;<SOURCE_DIR><SOURCE_SUBDIR>;-B;<BINARY_DIR>'
